title: Aminophylline
body_html:
Aminophyline Key Points
  • A mixture of theophyline and ethylenediammine.
  • Theophyline is a xanthine bronchodilator used in acute asthma.
  • It is metabolised by the liver
  • Narrow therapeutic index levels therefore levels must be monitored.
  • Plasma concentration of 10-20mg/litre will achieve satisfactory bronchodilation.
